title: Rosļikovs banned from joining Rīga City Council meetings from Belarus
summary_full: Aleksejs Rosļikovs, a Riga City Council member who has gone to Belarus, participated remotely in a meeting of the Riga City Council’s Urban Development Committee on Wednesday. Rīga's mayor has stated he would ban Rosļikovs from participating remotely, LETA reported on April 15.
